title: Top 10 small-cap energy stocks ranked by dividend yield
content:
[Oil pump in western Kazakhstan]
NiseriN/iStock via Getty Images

As the market grapples with volatility, below is a list of the top 10 small-cap energy stocks based in the United States, ranked by their forward dividend yield.

The list is topped by CrossAmerica Partners LP (CAPL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CAPL]), with a dividend yield of 10.08%. Kimbell Royalty Partners, LP (KRP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/KRP]) and Vitesse Energy, Inc. (VTS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/VTS]) are next, with TXO Partners, L.P. (TXO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TXO]) and Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (GRNT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GRNT]) rounding out the rest of the top five. Diversified Energy Company (DEC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DEC]), Global Partners LP (GLP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GLP]) and Riley Exploration Permian, Inc. (REPX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/REPX]) are among the other high-yielding stocks on the list.

The list concludes with VAALCO Energy, Inc. (EGY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/EGY]) and World Kinect Corporation (WKC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WKC]), which offer dividend yields of 3.99% and 3.41%, respectively.

Here is the list:

 	*
CrossAmerica Partners LP Common Units (CAPL [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/CAPL]), Dividend yield: 10.08%

 	*
Kimbell Royalty Partners, LP Common Units (KRP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/KRP]), Dividend yield: 10.03%

 	*
Vitesse Energy, Inc. (VTS [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/VTS]), Dividend yield: 9.67%

 	*
TXO Partners, L.P. Common Units (TXO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/TXO]), Dividend yield: 9.58%

 	*
Granite Ridge Resources, Inc. (GRNT [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GRNT]), Dividend yield: 7.68%

 	*
Diversified Energy Company (DEC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/DEC]), Dividend yield: 6.79%

 	*
Global Partners LP Common Units (GLP [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/GLP]), Dividend yield: 6.76%

 	*
Riley Exploration Permian, Inc. (REPX [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/REPX]), Dividend yield: 4.37%

 	*
VAALCO Energy, Inc. (EGY [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/EGY]), Dividend yield: 3.99%

 	*
World Kinect Corporation (WKC [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/WKC]), Dividend yield: 3.41%
